column2: omnis terra~; servīte Dominō in laetitiā. Introīte in conspectū ejus in exsultātiōne. ^ Sing joyfully to God
column3: all the earth~; serve ye the Lord with gladness~; come in before his presence with exceeding great joy.

column1: 3 ^ Scītōte quoniam Dominus ipse est Deus. Ipse fēcit nōs
column2: et nōn ipsī nōs~; populus ejus
column3: et ovēs pāscuae ejus. ^ Know ye that the Lord he is God. He made us
column4: and not we ourselves~; his people
column5: and the sheep of his pasture.

column2: ātria ejus in himnīs. Confitēminī illī~; laudāte nōmen ejus
column3: ^ Go ye into his gates with praise
column4: into his courts with hymns. Give glory to him~; praise ye his name

column3: et usque in generātiōnem et generātiōnem vēritās ejus. ^ for the Lord is sweet
column5: and his truth to generation and generation.
